ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2007 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2007 Continued To Sep-04-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jul-17-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Gilbert Purcell, Esq. for Plaintiff: David Setterberg.
Order waiving live Witness is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and reviewing of the filed declaration and brief, the Court taken the matter under submission.
Proposed Judgment received in court for:
Interest $24.07
Costs $445.48, for a total of $469.55.
